response.justification: The candidate has a strong software development background with experience in various technologies, but lacks direct experience in SoC and IP modeling, performance analysis for AI accelerators, and hardware-software co-design.
strengths: Experience with diverse programming languages and technologies
Strong background in software development and testing
Proven ability to work on complex projects
concerns: Lack of direct experience in SoC and IP modeling
No clear experience with AI/deep-learning workloads or GPU architecture
Not directly related to cloud infrastructure and hardware optimization
